description: M5 compliance mapping layer: binds selected M4 rhetoric blocks to minimum M6 evidence anchors to reduce unsupported claims. L2 generic rules apply to all products; L4 may override or extend.

rules.description: 疗效数据块必须包含至少一个量化终点指标和一个统计学锚点
rules.message: Efficacy block requires at least one quantitative efficacy variable and one statistical anchor (P-value, HR, CI, or NNT).

rules.description: 安全性块必须包含不良事件发生率数据
rules.message: Safety block requires incidence-rate style evidence anchor to support AE claims.

rules.description: 生物标志物块必须包含客观检测数据
rules.message: Biomarker block requires at least one VAR_BIOMARKER_* anchor with objective measurement data.

rules.description: 竞品对比块必须引用证据变量并说明比较方法学
rules.message: Competitive comparison block requires evidence variables from multiple sources and a stated comparison methodology.

rules.description: 机制解析块必须包含靶点或通路级别的科学依据
rules.message: Mechanism block requires at least one VAR_MOA_* anchor describing the molecular/cellular pathway.

rules.description: 权威引用块必须包含可追溯的文献或指南出处
rules.message: Guideline/authority block requires a verifiable citation reference (DOI, PMID, or named guideline).

rules.description: 疾病负担块必须包含流行病学或卫生经济学数据
rules.message: Disease burden block requires epidemiological or health-economic data anchors.

rules.description: 统计学拆解块必须包含原始统计量和证据变量
rules.message: Stats teardown block requires raw statistical measures (HR, P-value, CI) and at least one evidence variable.

rules.description: 负面终点保全块必须同时包含安全性证据和替代获益证据
rules.message: Negative-endpoint recovery block must include BOTH safety evidence (VAR_SAFETY_*) AND alternative efficacy evidence (VAR_EFFICACY_*) to maintain clinical defensibility.

rules.description: 长期主义对照块必须包含纵向随访数据
rules.message: Long-term framing block requires longitudinal follow-up data anchors and efficacy variables.

rules.description: 跨机构分歧块必须引用至少两个监管机构的立场
rules.message: Cross-authority block requires positions from at least two distinct regulatory agencies.

rules.description: 获益人群块必须包含明确的入排标准或人群特征
rules.message: Indication block requires explicit population criteria or indication scope.

rules.description: 无人区突破块必须按证据层级递进（分子→体外→临床）
rules.message: Frontier evidence ladder block requires MOA-level anchors and novelty claims backed by evidence.

rules.description: 多维获益块必须覆盖至少两个不同维度的终点
rules.message: Multi-dimensional value block requires evidence across at least two distinct outcome dimensions (efficacy + patient-centric).
